en: I do the same thing, I told you that I never would I told you I'd change, even when I knew I never could
ko: 나는 내가 절대 하지 않겠다고 말한 것과 같은 일을 해

en: Know that I can't find nobody else as good as you I need you to stay, need you to stay
ko: 너만큼 좋은 사람을 찾을 수 없다는 걸 알아

en: I get drunk, wake up, I'm wasted still
ko: 나는 취하고, 깨면 여전히 취해 있어

en: I realize the time that I wasted, yeah I feel like you can't feel the way I feel
I'll be fucked up if you can't be right, yeah Oh-oh-oh-oh-oh
ko: 네가 옳지 않다면 나는 망가질 거야
